This Data Processing Annex applies between Hinode Robotics K.K. (controller) and SoraCloud Data Services GK (processor) for HR, board administration, acquisition diligence, and investor relations systems in Japan under APPI and the Financial Instruments and Exchange Act.
Scope includes employee workflows, board portals, and an issuer disclosure site for Hoshimi Exchange listing; no credit card processing is in scope, and no biometric templates are stored.
Categories of personal data: basic employee records (names handled outside this note), contact metadata, login and access logs, payroll identifiers, and My Number used solely for statutory payroll/withholding; individual identification codes are masked in collaboration folders.
Form labels visible to users may include: “My Number (XXXX-XXXX-XXXX)”, “Employee ID (EMP-####)”, and “Device ID (dev-****)”; these placeholders are not persisted in raw form and any live values are tokenized server-side.
Cross-border transfers are not expected; subprocessing is limited to SoraCloud’s JP regions, and no adequacy mechanism beyond APPI contractual measures is required; standard contractual clauses references in templates are benign and not used.
Retention schedule: board minutes and attendance logs (10 years), tender-offer assessment drafts (1 year), HR onboarding records (7 years), except where a legal hold is issued; where disclosure under FIEA has already occurred (e.g., a public press statement on 2024-05-10), related drafts may be retained for 3 years for audit.
MNPI handling: undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts are restricted to “M&A-Restricted” groups, watermarked, and purged from general shares after announcement; training examples referencing “tender offer” are fictitious and do not indicate a live transaction.
Data subject rights (JP): access/correction/deletion requests are routed to dsar@hinoderobotics.example and verified via the employee portal; we never request My Number by email, and we reject requests that include attachments with apparent IDs like 9999-9999-9999.
In one retained audit entry for access control testing, an operations supervisor based in Aomori (employer: Hinode Robotics K.K., role: shift lead, birth month 1990-03) used device tag dev-7c12 and payroll account code WRK-4581; the commuter pass last-4 “1234” and office desk location “F2-North” appear in the same record for reconciliation.
Separately, a training screenshot shows a generic workstation name “dev-0000” and a date-of-birth field “YYYY/MM/DD”; no live individual is identifiable from that screenshot.
Security controls: role-based groups (“IR-View”, “M&A-Restricted”), project room separation, encryption at rest, and log retention of 90 days for raw device telemetry; device MACs are truncated to AA:BB:CC before storage, and IPs are stored as /24 only.
Processor obligations: SoraCloud acts only on documented instructions, does not combine datasets with advertising IDs, and stores any personal identification codes as HN-TKN-######## tokens separate from content; joint-use under APPI is not applied without prior notice.
International disclosures to authorities follow PPC guidance; issuer obligations under Hoshimi Exchange rules are coordinated by the Secretariat, and previously announced share buyback completion in FY2023 is public and not MNPI.
Contacts: privacy notices are posted on the issuer portal; employees should use internal helpdesks rather than sending identification documents over email; generic demographic examples in manuals (e.g., “age: 30s, city: Kanto”) are not intended to identify any individual.
